summary: Comprehensive testing of Food Truck Launch Pad data persistence features. All 7 new pages with save functionality tested and working. Backend APIs (23 tests) and Frontend UI (9 pages) all passing.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (9 pages tested, all save functions working)

test_credentials: No authentication required - all pages publicly accessible
seed_data_creation: Test data created with TEST_ prefix for easy cleanup
context_for_next_testing_agent: All persistence features are working correctly. Backend tests created in /app/backend/tests/test_persistence_apis.py cover all CRUD operations for: customer-profiles, assessments, scaled-batches, payroll-plans, training-progress, simulation-progress, and permits. Frontend save buttons all trigger successful API calls and display toast notifications.
